# CognitiveMemory

Agent-facing facade of LCMA: retrieval, learning, and asserted state.

**Tier:** Core

## Modules

| Module | Size | Classes | Functions |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| `lithos.cognitive_memory` | L | 2 | 1 |

## Public API

### `lithos.cognitive_memory`
- class `NodeStats` ‚Äî Per-node retrieval / salience stats returned by :meth:`CognitiveMemory.node_stats`.
- class `CognitiveMemory` ‚Äî Module facade over LCMA's agent-facing surface (ADR-0005).
- def `recalibrate_salience` ‚Äî Run the one-time salience floor backfill as a standalone maintenance op.

## Dependencies

- Depends on: [Codec](Codec.md), [Config](Config.md), [Coordination](Coordination.md), [Errors](Errors.md), [Events](Events.md), [Graph](Graph.md), [Intake](Intake.md), [Knowledge](Knowledge.md), [LCMA](LCMA.md), [Provenance](Provenance.md), [Search](Search.md), [Telemetry](Telemetry.md)
- Used by: [Entrypoints](Entrypoints.md)

## Data stores

- `stats_db` ‚Äî stats.db ‚Äî salience, retrieval, coactivation (SQLite)
